title: uncaria scandens
intro: Uncaria scandens, also known as Cat's Claw or Uña de Gato, is a woody vine native to the Amazon rainforest and is a member of the Rubiaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities, making it a popular remedy for various health issues. The health benefits associated with Uncaria scandens include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and even exhibit potential anti-cancer properties. In herbal preparations, Uncaria scandens is typically used in teas, capsules, and tinctures, and can also be found in combination with other herbs in traditional medicine blends.
